autogate.closedelay.tooltip: How long the gate stays open after you walk away. 60 ticks = ~1 second.
magnet.radius.tooltip: How far away items will be pulled towards you, in tiles.
magnet.speed.tooltip: How fast items move towards you. Higher = faster pickup.
sellprice.showartisan.tooltip: If you have the Artisan profession, show the boosted (+40%) prices instead of base prices.
sellprice.highlight.tooltip: Mark the most profitable processing option with an asterisk (*).
quickstack.key.tooltip: Press this to top up matching stacks in nearby chests with items from your inventory.
quickstack.radius.tooltip: How far around you chests are searched for matching stacks.
quickstack.moved: Quick stacked {{count}} items into nearby chests.
quickstack.nothing: No matching stacks found in nearby chests.
